description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named flare that runs on every push to any branch, on every pull request to any branch, and on a weekly schedule. Use a matrix strategy to build and test LAMMPS with different combinations of OpenMP, Lapack, and Python versions. For each combination, set up Python, install dependencies, build LAMMPS, install LAMMPS, patch ASE, run tests, and generate documentation with Doxygen and Sphinx. Publish the documentation to GitHub Pages for specific matrix configurations.
